title: ArborFirmaCraft (AFC)
description: An addon for TerraFirmaCraft (TFC) adding new trees, new wood types, and tree-tapping recipes.
body:
Introduction:

ArborFirmaCraft set out to solve two gripes I had with TerraFirmaCraft—that despite the plethora of woods added by the mod, most of the vanilla wood colors were unobtainable, and that of the nineteen tree species added, most are found only in the temperate climates—about five of these nineteen trees cannot be found naturally in the United States, depending on how you count. Of course, these problems provide something of a natural solution to each other.

**1.21 Feature List:**

*   Some Trees bloom in the spring
*   Yellow Ipe
*   Flame of the Forest
*   Red Silk Cotton
*   Giant Rosewood
*   Tree tapping for syrup and rubber
*   Larger Old Growth Trees
*   Made of special log variants that drop less wood to preserve some balance
*   Tree Species: In ArborFirmaCraft, multiple tree species may share one wood type: for instance, there are five species of pine, Boreal Pine, Stone Pine, Red Pine, Huangshan Pine, and Tamarack, all with unique leaves, saplings, and tree shapes, but that all drop pine logs. See the list below for all wood types and species added.
*   14 new wood types used by 33 new tree species:
*   Araucaria (Color matches Vanilla Pale Oak)
    *   Monkey Puzzle Tree/Pewen
    *   Kauri
    *   Columnar Araucaria
    *   Parana Pine
*   Beech (Brown color)
    *   Common Beech
    *   Black Beech
    *   Rauli Beech
    *   Chinquapin
*   Ginkgo (Teal color)
*   Blue Mahoe (Blue color)
*   Eucalyptus (Color matches Vanilla birch)  
    *   Blue Gum
    *   Mountain Ash
    *   Rainbow Eucalyptus
*   Mahogany (Color matches Vanilla mangrove in 1.18, made more purplish in 1.20)
    *   Small Leaf Mahogany
    *   Big Leaf Mahogany
    *   Sapele Mahogany
*   Baobab (Color matches Vanilla acacia)
*   Hevea (Color matches Classic TFC white elm)
*   Tualang (Blue-grey)
*   Teak (Color matches Vanilla jungle)
    *   True Teak
    *   Iroko Teak
    *   Flame of the Forest
*   Cypress (Color matches Vanilla spruce)
    *   Slender Cypress
    *   Weeping Cypress
    *   Bald Cypress
    *   Redcedar
    *   Juniper
*   Fig (Color matches Vanilla cherry blossom)
    *   Rusty Fig
    *   Rubber Fig
    *   Ipe
*   Yellow Ipe
*   Ironwood
    *   King Ironwood
    *   Lebombo Ironwood
    *   Horsetail Ironwood
*   40+ new tree species using TFC wood types, including re-works of existing trees
*   Acacia
    *   Umbrella Thorn Acacia
    *   Gum Arabic
    *   Acacia Koa
*   Aspen
    *   Quaking Aspen
    *   Poplar
*   Birch
    *   Paper Birch
    *   Blackwood
*   Chestnut
    *   Giant Chestnut (American Chestnut)
    *   Hardy Chestnut (Chinese Chestnut)
*    Blackwood
    *   Mulga Blackwood
    *   Mpingo Blackwood
*   Fir
    *   Douglas Fir
    *   Mountain Fir
    *   Balsam Fir
    *   Hickory
*   Bitternut Hickory
*   Scrub Hickory
*   Kapok
    *   Kapok
    *   Red Silk Cotton
    *   Maple
*   Sugar Maple
*   Weeping Maple
*   Bigleaf Maple
*   Oak
    *   Pin Oak
    *   Black Oak
    *   Live Oak
*   Pine
    *   Boreal Pine
    *   Stone Pine
    *   Red Pine
    *   Tamarack
    *   Huanghan Pine
*   Palm
    *   Queen Palm
    *   Jaggery Palm
*   Rosewood
    *   Shisham Rosewood
    *   Jacaranda
    *   Sequoia
*   Sequoia
    *   Coast Redwood
    *   Dawn Redwood
*   Spruce
    *   Blue Spruce
    *   Coast Spruce
    *   Sitka Spruce
    *   Black Spruce
    *   Cedar
*   White Cedar
*   Atlas Cedar
*   Willow
    *   Corkscrew Willow
    *   Weeping Willow


1.20 Feature List:

    Biome-based forests
    Three forest types, "Swamp", "Normal", and "Alpine"
    Different tree species are restricted to different forest types
    Some Trees bloom in the spring
    Yellow Ipe
    Flame of the Forest
    Red Silk Cotton
    Giant Rosewood
    Tree tapping for syrup and rubber
    Larger Old Growth Trees
    Made of special log variants that drop less wood to preserve some balance
    Tree Species: In ArborFirmaCraft, multiple tree species may share one wood type: for instance, there are four species of pine, Boreal Pine, Stone Pine, Red Pine, and Tamarack, all with unique leaves, saplings, and tree shapes, but that all drop pine logs. See the list below for all wood types and species added.

1.18 Feature List:

    Biome-based forests
    Three forest types, "Swamp", "Normal", and "Alpine"
    Different tree species are restricted to different forest types
    Seasonal colormap changes
    Different tree species use different autumn color maps
    No trees that lose their leaves generate in the tropics
    Some trees bloom in the spring
    Tree tapping for syrup and rubber
    "Ancient" logs and wood blocks
    Used in old growth tree structures, and have a reduced log drop rate
    Separates tree types from wood types, allowing for multiple species of tree to share the same wood color, but use different shapes, and sometimes different bark textures. Examples below
    8 new wood types used by 16 new tree species:
    Eucalyptus (Vanilla birch)
        Blue Gum
        Mountain Ash
        Rainbow Eucalyptus
    Mahogany (Vanilla mangrove in 1.18, purplish in 1.20)

    Baobab (Vanilla acacia)
    Hevea (Classic TFC white elm)

    Cypress (Vanilla spruce)
        Slender Cypress
        Weeping Cypress
        Bald Cypress
        Redcedar
    Fig (Vanilla cherry blossom)
        Rusty Fig
        Rubber Fig
